# Indian Foodtech — Complete Site Content

> B2B peanut butter manufacturer and exporter based in Surat, Gujarat, India. Daily production: 5 MT. Exports to 75+ countries. Certifications: FSSAI, Halal, ISO.

Indian Foodtech is a certified peanut butter and nut butter manufacturer serving importers, distributors, retail brands, and supermarket chains worldwide. We offer private label manufacturing, custom formulations, and bulk export from India.

---

## Company Overview

Indian Foodtech is headquartered in Surat, Gujarat, India, with a manufacturing facility at Ground Floor, Plot No. 197-198, Om Industries Estate, Vibhag 1, Village Mankana, Kamrej, Surat - 394190.

- Daily production capacity: 5 MT of peanut butter and nut butters
- Export reach: 75+ countries across 6 continents
- Facility: Advanced roasting, grinding, and color-sorting systems
- Primary shipping ports: Mundra Port and Nhava Sheva (JNPT), India
- Shipping transit times: UAE 18–22 days, Europe 22–28 days, Americas 25–35 days

## Certifications & Compliance

- FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India)
- Jamiyat Halal Certification
- Halal Certification
- ISO Certification
- Non-GMO Project Verified (per-product)
- Keto Certified (per-product)
- Gluten Free (per-product)
- EU food law compliance: aflatoxin limits (max 4 ppb total), allergen management, batch traceability
- US FDA compliance support available

---

## Products

### Category 1: Peanut Butter

**Natural Creamy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: 100% Premium Roasted Peanuts
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 199 kcal, Fat 14g, Carbs 5g, Protein 9g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/natural-creamy-peanut-butter

**Natural Crunchy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: 100% Premium Roasted Peanuts
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 199 kcal, Fat 14g, Carbs 5g, Protein 9g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/natural-crunchy-peanut-butter

**Classic Creamy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: Roasted Peanut, Sugar, Salt, Stabilizer (to prevent oil separation)
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 190 kcal, Fat 13g, Carbs 9g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/classic-creamy-peanut-butter

**Classic Crunchy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: Roasted Peanut, Sugar, Salt, Stabilizer (to prevent oil separation)
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 190 kcal, Fat 13g, Carbs 9g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/classic-crunchy-peanut-butter

**Chocolate Creamy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: Organic peanuts, organic honey, organic palm fruit oil, sea salt
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 210 kcal, Fat 16g, Carbs 10g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/chocolate-creamy-peanut-butter

**Chocolate Crunchy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: Organic peanuts, organic honey, organic palm fruit oil, sea salt
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 210 kcal, Fat 16g, Carbs 10g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/chocolate-crunchy-peanut-butter

**Elaichi (Cardamom) Creamy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: Roasted Peanut, Sugar, Salt, Stabilizer (to prevent oil separation)
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 190 kcal, Fat 13g, Carbs 9g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/elaichi-creamy-peanut-butter

**Elaichi (Cardamom) Crunchy Peanut Butter**
- Ingredients: Roasted Peanut, Sugar, Salt, Stabilizer (to prevent oil separation)
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 190 kcal, Fat 13g, Carbs 9g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/elaichi-crunchy-peanut-butter

**Natural Creamy Peanut Butter Sugar Free**
- Ingredients: Roasted Peanuts 98%, Salt, Stabilizer (E471)
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 199 kcal, Fat 14g, Carbs 5g, Protein 9g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/natural-creamy-peanut-butter-sugar-free

**Natural Crunchy Peanut Butter Sugar Free**
- Ingredients: Roasted Peanuts 98%, Salt, Stabilizer (E471)
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 199 kcal, Fat 14g, Carbs 5g, Protein 9g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/natural-crunchy-peanut-butter-sugar-free

### Category 2: Nut Butters

**Almond Butter**
- Ingredients: 100% Roasted California Almonds
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 195 kcal, Fat 18g, Carbs 6g, Protein 7g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/almond-butter

**Cashew Butter**
- Ingredients: 100% Roasted Premium Cashews
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 186 kcal, Fat 15g, Carbs 9g, Protein 6g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/cashew-butter

**Tahini (Sesame Paste)**
- Ingredients: 100% Roasted Premium Hulled Sesame
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 191 kcal, Fat 17g, Carbs 7g, Protein 5g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/tahini-sesame-paste

### Category 3: Spread

**Hazelnut Chocolate Spread**
- Ingredients: Hazelnut (10%), Cocoa Powder (10%), Milk Solid (3%), Palm Oil (35%), Sugar (41.2%), Salt, Emulsifier (INS471), Vanilla, Natural Identical Flavor
- Nutrition per 2 tbsp (32g): 190 kcal, Fat 16g, Carbs 7g, Protein 8g
- Certifications: Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg, 20 kg pail
- URL: https://www.indianfoodtech.com/products/hazealnut-chocolate-spread

---

## Packaging & Shipping

### Retail Sizes
227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg

### Industrial Sizes
20 kg food-grade pails, 235 kg HDPE drums

### Packaging Formats (Private Label)
Plastic jars, glass jars, stand-up pouches, squeeze tubes, single-serve sachets, 20 kg pails, 235 kg HDPE drums
Label options: full-wrap shrink labels, direct print, paper label overlay

### Shipping
Primary ports: Mundra Port and Nhava Sheva (JNPT), India
Transit times: UAE 18–22 days | Europe 22–28 days | Americas 25–35 days
Container types: 20-foot and 40-foot shipping containers

---

## Export Documentation

For every export order, Indian Foodtech provides:
- Commercial Invoice
- Packing List
- Certificate of Origin
- Phytosanitary Certificate
- Health Certificate
- Aflatoxin Lab Reports
- Halal Certificate copies
- Support for EU, GCC, ASEAN, UK, and US customs requirements

---

## Country-Specific Export Pages

Indian Foodtech has dedicated landing pages for every country it serves, covering bulk peanut butter import, private label manufacturing, and supplier services. Each page includes product specs, export process, documentation support, and contact details specific to that market.

All pages offer: bulk supply, private label & OEM services, flexible packaging (200g to 25kg), custom formulations, and full export documentation.

### Europe — Peanut Butter Importer Pages

- Germany — [/peanut-butter-import-germany](https://www.indianfoodtech.com/peanut-butter-import-germany)

---

## Private Label Service

Indian Foodtech offers end-to-end private label manufacturing:
- Custom formulation (roast profiles, sweetness, viscosity, texture)
- Branded packaging design support
- Label printing with client artwork
- Destination-market labeling compliance (including Arabic label compliance for GCC)
- Full export documentation under the client's brand name

Clients: retail brands, health food companies, supermarket chains, distributors, e-commerce brands

MOQ: One 20-foot container (~15,000–18,000 kg); reduced pallet-level MOQ for new brand launches
Lead time: 2–3 weeks (repeat orders with established formula); 4–6 weeks (new projects)
Samples: Standard samples ship within 5–7 business days; custom samples 10–14 business days

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General

**What is Indian Foodtech?**
Indian Foodtech is a B2B peanut butter manufacturer and exporter based in Surat, Gujarat, India. We produce over 5 MT of peanut butter daily and export to 75+ countries worldwide. We hold FSSAI, Halal, and ISO certifications.

**What certifications does Indian Foodtech hold?**
Indian Foodtech holds FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) license, Jamiyat Halal Certification, Halal Certification, and ISO Certification. Our peanut butters are also Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, and Gluten Free.

**What is the daily production capacity of Indian Foodtech?**
Indian Foodtech has a daily production capacity of 5 MT of peanut butter and nut butters at our facility in Surat, Gujarat, equipped with advanced roasting, grinding, and color-sorting systems.

**Which countries does Indian Foodtech export to?**
Indian Foodtech exports to 75+ countries across Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, and the Americas. Key markets include Germany, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, the UK, France, Australia, Singapore, and South Africa.

**Is Indian Foodtech's peanut butter halal certified?**
Yes. Indian Foodtech holds both Jamiyat Halal Certification and standard Halal Certification. All products are manufactured in a halal-compliant facility, making them suitable for GCC, Middle East, Southeast Asia, and African markets.

**How do I contact Indian Foodtech for a bulk order?**
Call us at +91 97148 99711 or email office@indianfoodtech.in or sales@indianfoodtech.in. You can also submit an inquiry via the Contact Us page. Our export team responds within 24 hours on business days.

### Products

**What types of peanut butter does Indian Foodtech manufacture?**
We manufacture 10 peanut butter varieties: Natural Creamy, Natural Crunchy, Classic Creamy, Classic Crunchy, Chocolate Creamy, Chocolate Crunchy, Elaichi Creamy, Elaichi Crunchy, Sugar-Free Natural Creamy, and Sugar-Free Natural Crunchy. We also produce Almond Butter, Cashew Butter, Tahini, and Hazelnut Chocolate Spread.

**What packaging sizes are available for bulk peanut butter orders?**
Retail sizes: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, and 1 kg. Industrial sizes: 20 kg pails and 235 kg HDPE drums. We optimize container loading for 20-foot and 40-foot shipping containers.

**What is the nutritional profile of your peanut butter?**
Per 2 tablespoons (32g) of Natural Peanut Butter: 199 kcal, 14g fat, 5g carbohydrates, 9g protein. Classic Peanut Butter: 190 kcal, 13g fat, 9g carbohydrates, 8g protein per 32g. Full nutrition sheets are available on request.

**Do you offer custom peanut butter formulations?**
Yes. We offer custom roast profiles, sweetness levels, viscosity, texture (creamy to crunchy), and flavour infusions. Reduced-sugar, high-protein, and aflatoxin-controlled specifications for EU and FDA compliance are available on request.

**What aflatoxin controls are in place for your peanut butter?**
We source peanuts from pre-screened suppliers, conduct incoming raw material testing, apply color sorting to remove discolored nuts, and test each batch for aflatoxin levels before dispatch. Our limits are aligned with EU regulations (max 4 ppb total aflatoxins) and US FDA guidelines.

### Export & Shipping

**What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for export?**
Standard export MOQ is one 20-foot container (approximately 15,000–18,000 kg depending on pack size). For private label newcomers or market pilots, flexible pallet-level MOQs are available. Contact our export team to discuss your requirements.

**What export documentation does Indian Foodtech provide?**
We provide Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, Phytosanitary Certificate, Health Certificate, Lab Reports (including aflatoxin tests), and Halal Certificate copies. We support customs requirements for EU, GCC, ASEAN, UK, and US markets.

**Which shipping ports does Indian Foodtech use?**
We ship primarily from Mundra Port and Nhava Sheva (JNPT) in India. Typical transit times: UAE 18–22 days, Europe 22–28 days, Americas 25–35 days.

**Does Indian Foodtech comply with EU food safety regulations?**
Yes. Our manufacturing meets EU General Food Law requirements including strict aflatoxin limits, allergen management, batch traceability, clean-label production, and full export documentation. We work with accredited third-party labs for compliance testing and support non-GMO sourcing for European markets.

**Can Indian Foodtech supply to GCC and Middle Eastern markets?**
Yes. We supply UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait and other GCC markets. Our Halal certifications meet mandatory import requirements. We customize sweetness, roast profiles, and labeling for Middle Eastern preferences, including Arabic label compliance.

### Private Label

**What does Indian Foodtech's private label service include?**
Our end-to-end private label service covers custom formulation, branded packaging design support, label printing with your artwork, destination-market labeling compliance, and full export documentation under your brand name. We serve retail brands, health food companies, supermarket chains, and distributors.

**What is the lead time for a private label peanut butter order?**
Repeat orders with established formulas: 2–3 weeks. New private label projects (formula development, packaging approval, quality sample): 4–6 weeks from confirmed order. Rush production is available.

**Can I get a sample before placing a private label bulk order?**
Yes. Request samples via our Contact Us page or email sales@indianfoodtech.in. Standard samples ship within 5–7 business days. Custom-formulated samples take 10–14 business days. Sample shipping costs may apply by destination.

**What packaging formats are available for private label?**
Plastic jars, glass jars, stand-up pouches, squeeze tubes, single-serve sachets, 20 kg food-grade pails, and 235 kg HDPE drums. Label options include full-wrap shrink labels, direct print, and paper label overlay. We support supermarket, food service, and e-commerce formats.

**Is there a minimum order quantity for private label orders?**
Standard private label MOQ is one 20-foot container (approximately 15,000–18,000 kg). For new brand launches and pilots, reduced MOQ starting from a few pallets is available. Our team works with you to find a commercially viable MOQ for your launch stage.

---
